examples: The wail of the bagpipe could be heard in the distance.
This is a kind of Scottish bagpipe.
The Dubai police has a bagpipe band.
Berber ghaitas (oboes) sound at times uncannily Celtic, which may be why the word came to mean bagpipe in Spanish.
Bagpipe maker David Gould dismissed Mr Hibberts' attack and said he should appreciate the illustrious history of bagpipe making and playing.
